name: plan-what-it-does
default_program:
[stages: preflight>detect>analyze>plan>review>reflect>handoff>audit |
 scope: repo|paths(glob,...) |
 policy: evidence,quality-gates{docs,compat},deterministic-output |
 lens: minto-pyramid |
 output: md(contract=v1)]

required_inputs.name: USER_OUTCOME
required_inputs.description: Core user-visible or contract-visible outcome the feature must enable.

required_inputs.name: REQUIRED_BEHAVIORS
required_inputs.description: Concrete in-scope behaviors the implementation must satisfy.

required_inputs.name: ACCEPTANCE_SCENARIOS
required_inputs.description: Observable acceptance scenarios and expected results.

required_inputs.name: OUT_OF_SCOPE
required_inputs.description: Explicit exclusions so the feature boundary stays stable.

required_inputs.name: CONSTRAINTS
required_inputs.description: Compatibility, rollout, performance, policy, or non-goal constraints.
